title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 43.541 - Senate investigator to have access to criminal history without charge from criminal justice agencies reporting to central repository
text:
43.541.  Senate investigator to have access to criminal history without charge from criminal justice agencies reporting to central repository. — Each criminal justice agency which submits criminal arrest, charge and disposition information to the central repository shall make criminal history information available on request to the investigator of the Missouri senate without charge.
(L. 1992 H.B. 852 § 1)
